title: leptochilus zollingeri
intro: Leptochilus zollingeri, also known as Zollinger's club moss, is a type of plant belonging to the family Lycopodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Leptochilus zollingeri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and ease congestion, making it a valuable remedy for individuals suffering from respiratory infections. Leptochilus zollingeri is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
